offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient invoice processing causes late payments. We consolidate and format invoices instead of manual invoice entry and formatting.
problem: Inefficient invoice processing leading to late payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try manual invoice consolidation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Allow CSV import for existing invoices
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
